Event: The Abyssal Adventure
Event Date: 13/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E73
Song of the Abyss

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit receives the infusion effect for 3 sec. The infused unit restores 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 health, and their damage, crit and physical armor piercing all increase by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% for 3 sec., while incoming damage against them is reduced by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while, the unit receives the infusion effect for 4 sec. The infused unit restores 75300 / 107500 / 153600 / 204800 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 health, and their damage, crit and physical armor piercing all increase by 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% for 4 sec., while incoming damage against them is reduced by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% for 4 sec. For 4 sec., the unit also deals 37600 / 53800 / 76800 / 102400 / 128000 / 180000 / 200000 additional pure damage to the attack target, and removes 2 random positive effects from it.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while, the unit receives the infusion effect for 5 sec. The infused unit restores 94100 / 134400 / 192000 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 / 500000 health, and their damage, crit and physical armor piercing all increase by 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 55% / 57% / 60% for 5 sec., while incoming damage against them is reduced by 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% for 5 sec. For 5 sec., the unit also deals 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 additional pure damage to the attack target and all enemy units in a small radius around, and removes 3 random positive effects from each of them.

Requirements:
